    1. main(String[])

Class ServerMain

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am22.ServerMain
public final class ServerMain extends Object
Server entry point. Creates a single multi-match MatchManager shared by all transports, starts the socket listener on ConnectionFactory.DEFAULT_SOCKET_PORT and publishes the RMI stub on the registry at ConnectionFactory.DEFAULT_RMI_PORT under the binding ConnectionFactory.DEFAULT_RMI_BINDING.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    main(String[] args)
    Starts the server: the socket listener, the RMI stub and the shutdown hook.

      Starts the server: the socket listener, the RMI stub and the shutdown hook.
      Parameters:
      args - ignored
      Throws:
      Exception - if a transport fails to start
